channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: The abundance that AI may promise is not free
item.description: AI abundance promises free everything through massive centralized infrastructure. Whoever controls the energy and AI factories dictates distribution terms and user autonomy.

item.title: Bitcoin OGs dump over $100 million in BTC after hawkish Fed dents rate cut hopes
item.description: OGs sell as Fed's hawkish stance on rates pressures crypto and other risk assets.

item.title: Forget market hours: Leading ETP firm just opened 24/7 liquidity for tokenized stocks, gold and money market funds
item.description: ETP market giant Flow Traders just launched 24/7 over-the-counter (OTC) liquidity service for tokenized assets.

item.title: Canada revokes 47 crypto money licenses, vows to continue
item.description: Near the end of last year, FINTRAC fined crypto platform Cryptomus $126 million and crypto exchange KuCoin $14 million for a range of alleged violations.

item.title: Visa and Stripe-backed Tempo unveil AI agent payment tools on same day
item.description: AI agent users received new tools from Visa and the Stripe-backed Tempo to provide a new way for agentic payments to take place online.

item.title: Retail tripled gold buying in last 6 months as Wall Street sells
item.description: “Retail-driven exuberance” in gold and silver ETFs and leveraged positions led to the end of the precious metals rally, reported the BIS.

item.title: Dorsey’s Block laid off 4K employees last month, some are already back
item.description: Block CEO Jack Dorsey said at the time of the layoffs that the company would have erred in some of the decisions it made and that it would correct mistakes.

item.title: Nasdaq Wins SEC Approval to Trade Tokenized Securities in Pilot Program
item.description: The approval lets Nasdaq test tokenized versions of some stocks and ETFs without moving beyond existing market rails.

item.title: Crypto traders eye ‘bullish relief rally’ after Fed holds rates steady
item.description: Expectation of a relief rally persisted despite a widely used crypto sentiment indicator falling back into “Extreme Fear” on Wednesday.

item.title: OpenClaw Developers Lured in GitHub Phishing Campaign Targeting Crypto Wallets
item.description: The phishing campaign lures OpenClaw developers with fake $5,000 token airdrops, then drains wallets through a cloned site with a hidden connection prompt.

item.title: XRP treasury Evernorth files with SEC to list shares on Nasdaq
item.description: Evernorth is moving closer to a public listing after filing a Form S-4 with the SEC, the final major regulatory hurdle of its SPAC merger plan.

item.title: Polymarket buys DeFi startup Brahma in latest acquisition wave
item.description: “Building reliable infrastructure across blockchain networks and traditional financial rails is hard,” said Polymarket CEO Shayne Coplan.

item.title: California court dismisses Coinbase user’s challenge to IRS summons
item.description: Another crypto user sued the IRS in 2025 for allegedly violating his Fourth Amendment rights after the agency used a John Doe summons to collect his data from a crypto exchange.

item.title: Why Bitcoin Is Falling Despite $1.1 Billion in ETF Inflows
item.description: Persistent inflation signals and surging oil prices are weighing on risk appetite, even as institutional money has continued to flow.

item.title: SEC gives go-ahead to Nasdaq for tokenized trading trial
item.description: Nasdaq has been given the regulatory green light to offer some tokenized stocks, which will trade alongside traditional securities on its exchange.

item.title: 🔥 LATEST: A Bitcoin OG who bought 5,000 $BTC for just $1.66M twelve years ago has sold another 1,000 $BTC ($71.57M), bringing total profits to $442M, a 266x return. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFAzQlJOMFVwWGhPUS1sSzdwbW5fS2ppTlJ6V1dOaFdBZUJ6eGpLVExWTEI1emU0RkdXQnJlV1MzUml4cmVVT000Tl80THZLNXdTbnRzWEt4RUZfTlZEUDR2TVFKTlc?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 LATEST: A Bitcoin OG who bou…

item.title: Algorand Foundation cuts 25% of staff, citing macro uncertainty
item.description: The Algorand Foundation said it has a “more sustainable alignment” of resources with the protocol’s long-term business priorities.

item.title: Bitcoin OG Owen Gunden, who previously sold 11K $BTC($1.12B), sold another 650 $BTC($46.3M) 10 hours ago. intel.arkm.com/explorer/addre… x.com/lookonchain/st… - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE41emxLQmpLWU9tQldTeVZkUlpoVTNIZFVZRmNhNHFyd0N0c290Z2VMUTdobFZnTF9HN00wTXZNTE1WYjJONXA5QVB6ZkY4dXpJcm9GQnlqSkEtb2hZaGY4SVpR?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin OG Owen Gunden, who previo…

item.title: Fold Q4 revenue up, CEO sees Bitcoin rewards overtaking air miles
item.description: Fold CEO Will Reeves said it is focused on scaling its 2026 product line after paying off two convertible debts, removing overhang and enabling it to focus on growth.

item.title: Coalition Urges OpenAI to Scrap AI Ballot Measure Over Child Safety Concerns
item.description: Advocacy groups say the OpenAI-backed measure would limit legal accountability and lock in narrow protections for children.

item.title: Bitcoin dips below $71K, but data shows BTC’s bullish momentum holding
item.description: Bitcoin dropped below $71,000, but the market remains tilted toward bulls as spot ETF inflows and BTC buying from Strategy boost investor sentiment.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Fed leaves rates unchanged, says geopolitical uncertainty clouds outlook
item.description: The effect on energy prices from the Iran war will impact the economy, but the size and scope of the macroeconomic shock are still unknown.

item.title: Kalshi CEO fires back against Arizona criminal charges as ‘total overstep’
item.description: The prediction markets co-founder said that the company would “abide by court decisions” but signaled that the charges were based partly on political bias and media attention.

item.title: Algorand Foundation Cuts 25% of Staff as Crypto Industry Layoffs Grow
item.description: The organization behind layer-1 blockchain Algorand laid off 25% of its staff due to macroeconomic uncertainty and lower crypto prices.

item.title: SEC approves Nasdaq's move to support tokenized securities trading
item.description: The SEC’s approval lets Nasdaq test blockchain-based versions of stocks that trade and settle like traditional shares.

item.title: Trump White House Registers Aliens.gov—Is the UFO File Drop Imminent?
item.description: The White House registered aliens.gov, a month after Trump ordered the release of all government UAP and UFO files following a viral Obama moment.

item.title: Fairshake's $10 million Illinois misfire marks first big hitch in crypto political surge
item.description: The crypto sector's leading political action committee devoted more than 5% of its war chest trying to defeat a Senate candidate who just won her primary.

item.title: From Coinbase to Ripple: The Biggest Crypto Cases Dumped by Trump's SEC
item.description: Under President Trump, the SEC has backed down from nearly all its fights with crypto firms. These are the biggest cases ended so far.

item.title: SEC Chair explains why NFTs typically fall outside of securities laws
item.description: Paul Atkins says nonfungible tokens are typically collectibles, not investment contracts, as the agency outlines new categories of digital assets outside securities laws.

item.title: Bitcoin sinks below $71,000, stocks close at session lows, as 2026 Fed rate cut hopes fade further
item.description: Fed chair Jerome Powell said rising energy prices are feeding into the inflation outlook, but "nobody knows" yet how lasting the impact will be.

item.title: Polymarket acquires Brahma to scale blockchain trading infrastructure
item.description: "Building reliable infrastructure across blockchain networks and traditional financial rails is hard — there are no shortcuts,” said Polymarket CEO Shayne Coplan.

item.title: FTX Recovery Trust to distribute $2.2B to creditors in March
item.description: The fourth round of reimbursements to creditors and former clients of the failed crypto exchange since February 2025 brings the total paid to about $10 billion.

item.title: Crypto Fear and Greed rebounds off extreme lows as traders re-enter
item.description: The Crypto Fear and Greed Index just ended a 48-day stretch in the “extreme fear” zone, signalling improving sentiment among investors. Will fresh capital inflows reignite the bull market?

item.title: ‘We are so close this time’ — Senator Lummis on market structure bill
item.description: The Wyoming Republican said the main issue holding up the bill's passage was stablecoin yield, adding that she believed a provision on DeFi had been “put to bed.”

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried's bankrupt exchange FTX set to repay creditors $2.2 billion this month
item.description: The trust handling the bankruptcy proceedings detailed how much will be distributed to creditors and claimants at the end of March.

item.title: Kalshi co-founder fights back against Arizona’s ‘overstep’ in what a lawyer calls a federal-state turf war
item.description: Arizona has filed 20 criminal counts against Kalshi, a prediction market platform, accusing it of operating an illegal gambling business and offering election wagering in the state.

item.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Waver as Fed Holds Interest Rates Steady
item.description: Inflation has exceeded the central bank’s 2% target for nearly five years, but the Fed held rates firm again as Bitcoin and Ethereum wobbled.

item.title: Federal Reserve holds policy steady as Iran war adds to growth and inflation concerns
item.description: Bitcoin remained sharply lower for the session following the expected decision by the U.S. central bank.

item.title: Myriad Traders Slash Spring Rally Chances as Bitcoin, Ethereum Slide
item.description: A hotter-than-expected inflation reading pushed crypto prices lower Wednesday—slashing the chances of a broad spring breakout.

item.title: It's not looking great for #Bitcoin with this drop. I'd prefer to see $69K-70K hold if we want to make another run towards those highs, and I think those are quite critical to me. If that doesn't hold, I would assume we'll see the $58-60K lower boundaries tested agai - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1jM052WkQ0ZmJpcGliWUpWdlFNRkNBT1FQX19JeVRQdDZpVHhRYmdmYVNGa1dKUlJ4c1N4RnNBaVc0aVpCUlhNNTNVWEVZTXE3ZHVmblEzOS1ZbjA2MUptb3ZUcw?oc=5" target="_blank">It's not looking great for #Bitc…

item.title: You Can Now Trade Official S&P 500 Perpetual Futures via Hyperliquid
item.description: The S&P 500 index was licensed to Trade[XYZ], a provider of markets for real-world assets on Hyperliquid for perpetual futures.

item.title: Crypto Market Structure Bill to Face Key Vote in April and Must Pass by May, Senators Say
item.description: Sen. Bernie Moreno said if the Clarity Act isn’t passed by May, “digital asset legislation will not pass for the foreseeable future.”

item.title: The era of cheap money is over as the Iran war creates a permanent 'inflation floor'
item.description: The Iran war is creating a permanent inflation floor that could end the era of cheap money and expose the fragility of global energy markets.

item.title: Pudgy Penguins Launched A New Game. Crypto Scammers Made A Fake Version
item.description: Malwarebytes has warned that a phishing campaign is mimicking the Pudgy World game to steal user credentials

item.title: Stripe-Backed Tempo Network Launches With Focus on AI Agent Payments
item.description: Tempo, the layer-1 blockchain backed by payments giant Stripe, launched its mainnet with a clear focus on AI agent payments.

item.title: Citi Downgrades Crypto Exchange Gemini After Cutting Bitcoin, Ethereum Price Targets
item.description: Gemini stock (GEMI) fell 16% on Wednesday following the downgrade and a broader market dip, after Citi cut its Bitcoin and Ethereum targets.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: When price stops working, yield starts mattering
item.description: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Ruchir Gupta writes on how we’re moving toward a true fixed-income market for crypto-native yield. Then, Clara García Prieto on bitcoin becoming mainstream collateral, but most are not prepare…

item.title: Folks, if you get crypto emails from websites claiming to be associated with openclaw, it's ALWAYS a scam. We would never do that. The project is open source and non-commercial. Use the official website. Be sceptical of folks trying to build commercial wrapp - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE85WDNqVlFLbEgxUXVtWFliWDhqRTdpdHR3YXF5T0RSWEJENFJBaFBUaWtwRERBbldDV0V5Wkx5UnFiSnA1WEstMjFOb1BVaVFfb3FaNVJjVWFYa29YYVE?oc=5" target="_blank">Folks, if you get crypto emails from we…

item.title: The Protocol: Ethereum community debates foundation’s new mandate document
item.description: Also: World’s AgentKit, Visa and Coinbase on AI agents, and prediction markets + AI.

item.title: Former Binance CEO CZ waves off accusations on Iran, terror ties
item.description: The founder of the world's largest exchange distanced himself from reports about Binance activity that reports had recently suggested aided terrorism.

item.title: Trump-linked American Bitcoin's BTC holdings overtake Mike Novogratz’s Galaxy Digital
item.description: American Bitcoin (ABTC) has climbed to become the 16th-largest bitcoin holder, with 6,899 BTC, as firms compete to build bitcoin treasuries.

item.title: Excited to share Visa CLI, the first experimental product from Visa Crypto Labs. Check it out and request access here visacli.sh - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE50TktuX2llLUJJTnBTcVh0eTNyS1B6ZGRwdExkUzA0eDk1UU5vY0VXVmhDNDZiZmRKaWZVSVYyRUZZRFR1NGxjTzU2UnNaWjZKcXNfLVAxTTFUMGIxSTBfaVBnTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Excited to share Visa CLI, the f…

item.title: 'Crypto Castle': YouTube Comedy Takes You Back to When Bitcoin Was Just $250
item.description: “The Crypto Castle” takes a look at the early days of Bitcoin—and the "sad evolution" it's undergone since then.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin is now projected to crash below $45,000 by the end of this year. 51% chance. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE1NZ3UtWlMxWlc5eXJLTG02cWhyUG1RN1FHVnp5OHFrZ2htUzNrZC16SnlScXY0Yzh4cmpLVlNnMk5Hd3A3OHRaVmU0UWZMX1UtVF9aZmNTcl9FS3ZIWFN2ZA?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin is now projected t…

item.title: Crypto exchange Kraken freezes multibillion-dollar IPO plan due to difficult market conditions
item.description: Kraken's parent company filed a draft S-1 registration statement with the SEC in November regarding the proposed initial public offering of its common stock.

item.title: Traders can now bet on the S&P 500 around the clock without ever touching a traditional stock exchange
item.description: S&P Dow Jones Indices licenses its flagship index for crypto trading on Hyperliquid, as perpetual futures gain traction beyond traditional markets.

item.title: Key U.S. senator on crypto market structure bill negotiation: 'We think we've got it'
item.description: Senator Cynthia Lummis, at the center of legislative talks, said the discussion is down to nuance and the bill will finally emerge from her committee in April.

item.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Slip on Inflation Surprise as Oil Prices Jump
item.description: Bitcoin fell alongside U.S. stocks after the world's largest gas field came under attack amid hotter-than-expected inflation data.

item.title: Bitcoin hash rate is tumbling as Iran war lifts energy prices
item.description: A falling hash rate and the resultant pressure on miners could signal another potential capitulation phase, which could push prices down further
